lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚਿ ਨਚਿ ਟਪਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: nach nach ttapeh bahut dukh paaveh |
lines.english: they dance and dance and jump all around, but they only suffer in terrible pain.
The fools perform devotional worship by showing off;
By dancing and jumping, devotional worship is not performed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabad marai bhagat paae jan soe |3|
lines.english: But one who dies in the Word of the Shabad, obtains devotional worship. ||3||
The Lord is the Lover of His devotees; He inspires them to perform devotional worship.
O Nanak, He forgives those who recognize the Naam. ||4||4||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh saachaa sabh bidh jaanai |
lines.english: My True God knows all ways and means.
True devotional worship consists of eliminating selfishness and conceit from within.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:
Without such a death, how can one find the Lord?
When someone kills and subdues his own mind, his wandering nature is also subdued.
He grants greatness to those whom He forgives.
Only a few know the medicine to kill the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man sabad marai boojhai jan soe |1|
lines.english: One whose mind dies in the Word of the Shabad, understands Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad har vasai man aaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Lord comes to dwell within the mind. ||1||Pause||
The Gurmukh practices doing good deeds;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: taa is man kee sojhee paavai |
lines.english: thus he comes to understand this mind.
The mind is like an elephant, drunk with wine.
The mind is uncontrollable; how rare are those who subdue it.
The Guru is the rod which controls it, and shows it the way. ||2||
The Gurmukhs embellish and beautify this mind.
They eradicate egotism and corruption from within. ||3||
Those who move the immovable become pure.
are never separated from Him again; they are absorbed in the Shabad.
Those who, by pre-ordained destiny, are united in the Lord's Union,
He Himself knows His Own Almighty Power.
O Nanak, the Gurmukh realizes the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||5||25||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:
The entire world has gone insane in egotism.
Occupied with their own affairs, their nights and days are passing away. ||1||
In the love of duality, it wanders deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਚਿਤਵੈ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu chintaa chitavai aap na pachhaanaa |
lines.english: The mind is distracted by great anxiety; no one recognizes one's own self.
Meditate on the Lord in your hearts, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh rasanaa har rasan rasaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh's tongue savors the sublime essence of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
They subdue egotism, and realize the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
The Gurmukhs recognize the Lord in their own hearts;
they serve the Lord, the Life of the World. They are famous throughout the four ages.
they restrain their wandering mind and keep it steady.
God, the Architect of Destiny, showers His Mercy upon them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਚੇ ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se jan sache jo gur sabad milaae |
lines.english: True are those who merge into the Word of the Guru's Shabad;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa te har vasai man aae |3|
lines.english: By the Lord's Grace, the Lord comes to dwell in the mind. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਕਰਤਿਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਰੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: raam raam karatiaa sukh saant sareer |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, the body becomes peaceful and tranquil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam nav nidh gur te paae |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the nine treasures. It is obtained from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰ ॥੪॥੬॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak sev sadaa har gunee gaheer |4|6|26|
lines.english: O Nanak, serve the Lord forever; He is the treasure of glorious virtue. ||4||6||26||
He Himself is our Lord and Master; He is His Own Advisor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਜਮ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: antar vasai na laagai jam peer |
lines.english: He dwells deep within - the pain of death does not touch Him.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਜੀਅ ਪਰਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau visarai jis ke jeea paraanaa |
lines.english: Why forget Him, unto whom the soul and the breath of life belong?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam vittahu bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Name of the Lord.
Serving Him, one is honored and accepted in the Court of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸਭ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau visarai sabh maeh samaanaa |
lines.english: Why forget Him, who is all-pervading?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਸਰਹਿ ਜਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tin toon visareh ji tudh aap bhulaae |
lines.english: Those whom You Yourself have led astray, forget You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਵਿਸਰਹਿ ਤਦਿ ਹੀ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon visareh tad hee mar jaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If I were to forget You, at that very instant, I would die. ||1||Pause||
